Professional Display Solutions with Durable Hardware & Vinyl Printing PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: • 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Retractors • 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Banner Retractors • Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Retractors Product Configuration: • Retractor Lite 36 Hardware Included • Standard Size: 78" x 36" Design Options: • Choose from Templates • Upload Your Files • Professional Design Service PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Stand Materials for Trade Show Displays

The Retractor Lite 36 delivers professional trade show displays with lightweight portability and reliable performance. This retractable banner stand combines economy with quality, making it ideal for occasional trade show displays, seasonal promotions, and professional events.

Vinyl & Fabric Options for Professional Banner Stands

Each retractable banner stand includes durable hardware and your choice of premium banner materials:

  • 13 oz Vinyl: Standard banner material rated for both indoor and outdoor trade show use
  • 14 oz No Curl Vinyl: Premium prints with smooth matte finish for professional displays
  • Banner Soft Fabric: Matte finish with vibrant colors for elegant presentations

Complete display solution includes the Retractor Lite 36 hardware mechanism and custom 78" x 36" banner, plus nylon carrying case for convenient transport between events.

Vinyl materials are temperature sensitive and may vary up to 1/2 inch per linear foot due to printing and climate conditions. For precision applications, consult with Customer Service about specific requirements.

Request free material samples to evaluate quality and finish options for your trade show displays.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Material Options for Professional Displays

Select from three premium materials designed specifically for retractable banner stand applications:

13 oz Vinyl for Indoor/Outdoor Use

Our most versatile banner material, rated for both indoor trade shows and outdoor events. Provides excellent durability and print quality for frequent display use.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl for Premium Displays

High-quality vinyl with smooth matte finish that resists curling and maintains professional appearance. Ideal for upscale trade shows and corporate events.

Banner Soft Fabric for Elegant Presentations

Matte finish fabric material produces vibrant colors and elegant appearance. Perfect for indoor trade shows, conferences, and professional presentations.

All materials are compatible with the Retractor Lite 36 hardware and designed for easy installation and removal. Size variations up to 1/2 inch per linear foot may occur due to material properties and printing processes.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing for Trade Show Banner Displays

Each retractable banner stand receives professional finishing designed for trade show durability:

Hardware Integration

Banner material is precision-cut and fitted with mounting hardware compatible with Retractor Lite 36 mechanism. Ensures smooth operation and secure display.

Edge Finishing

Clean-cut edges provide professional appearance and prevent fraying during transport and setup. All materials receive appropriate edge treatment for long-term use.

Protective Case Included

Nylon carrying case protects banner and hardware during transport. Lightweight design makes setup and breakdown simple for trade show environments.

Professional finishing ensures your banner stand maintains appearance and functionality through multiple trade show cycles.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

Choose production speed based on your trade show schedule and timeline requirements:

Express & Standard Production Schedules

2 Business Days Express

Fastest production for urgent trade show deadlines. Available for standard designs and materials.

3 Business Days Standard

Standard production timeline for most custom banner stand orders. Balances speed with thorough quality control.

5 Business Days Saver

Economy production schedule for advance planning. Best value option when timeline permits extended production.

Production times begin after artwork approval and do not include shipping time. For trade show deadline planning, add shipping time to production schedule when placing orders.

Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

Flexible payment solutions accommodate individual customers and trade show exhibitors:

Individual Payment Options

  • Credit and debit cards accepted
  • PayPal and digital payment methods
  • Secure online checkout process

Business Account Options

  • Net terms available for qualified accounts
  • Purchase orders accepted
  • Volume pricing for multiple banner stands

All transactions are processed securely with industry-standard encryption. Contact Customer Service for business account setup and payment term arrangements.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Trade Show Banner Displays

Reliable shipping ensures your banner stands arrive ready for trade show setup:

Delivery Methods for Banner Stand Hardware

Standard Ground Shipping

Most economical option for advance planning. Hardware and banner ship together in protective packaging.

Expedited Shipping Options

Overnight and 2-day shipping available for trade show deadlines. Hardware requires special handling due to weight and dimensions.

Trade Show Direct Shipping

Ship directly to convention centers and trade show venues. Advance arrangement recommended for venue delivery requirements.

Banner stands ship fully assembled and ready for immediate setup. Protective packaging prevents damage during transport to trade show locations.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Retractable Banner Stands

Versatile display solutions for professional presentations and promotional events:

Trade Show Applications

  • Booth backdrops and side displays
  • Product announcements and promotions
  • Corporate branding and messaging
  • Directional and informational displays

Business & Corporate Events

  • Conference presentations and seminars
  • Grand openings and store promotions
  • Job fairs and recruitment events
  • Seasonal sales and special offers

Professional Service Applications

  • Real estate open houses and showings
  • Professional services marketing
  • Educational and training events
  • Non-profit fundraising and awareness

Portable design and included carrying case make banner stands ideal for businesses that participate in multiple events throughout the year.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for trade show displays:

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector files (.eps, .ai): Best quality with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-resolution PDF: Minimum 300 DPI at actual print size
  • JPEG files: High resolution required for acceptable print quality

Design Specifications

  • Actual size: 78" x 36" finished dimensions
  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for crisp text and images
  • Color mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed area: Include if design extends to banner edges

Professional Design Support

Professional graphic designers available to assist with file preparation, color correction, and design optimization. Artwork consultation ensures your banner stand produces professional results for trade show presentations.

Submit artwork files through online upload system or work directly with design team for custom banner stand creation.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Retractable Banner Stands for Your Next Event

Professional trade show displays start with quality banner stand hardware and expert printing. The Retractor Lite 36 delivers reliable performance with convenient portability for exhibitors who participate in multiple events.

Complete Display Solution Includes:

  • Retractor Lite 36 hardware mechanism
  • Custom 78" x 36" banner with professional printing
  • Nylon carrying case for transport protection
  • Easy setup instructions and support

Getting Started

Configure your banner stand above by selecting material options and design method. Choose from professional templates, upload your artwork files, or work with our design team to create custom graphics for your trade show displays.

Questions about material selection or design requirements? Our Customer Service team provides expert guidance for trade show display solutions.

Call toll free: 866.419.7446
Customer Service: 320.391.5300

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Banner Stands

What hardware is included with the Retractor Lite 36?

Each order includes the complete Retractor Lite 36 retractable mechanism, custom printed banner, and nylon carrying case. Hardware is lightweight yet durable for trade show applications.

How do I set up the retractable banner stand?

Setup is simple: remove from carrying case, extend support feet, and pull banner up from base mechanism. Banner locks in place for stable display. Breakdown reverses the process for quick pack-up.

Can I replace just the banner without buying new hardware?

Yes, replacement banners are available for existing Retractor Lite 36 hardware. This allows you to update graphics while keeping the same display mechanism.

What's the difference between vinyl and fabric materials?

Vinyl materials (13 oz and 14 oz No Curl) offer durability for indoor/outdoor use with vibrant colors. Banner Soft Fabric provides an elegant matte finish ideal for upscale indoor presentations.

How much does the complete banner stand weigh?

The Retractor Lite 36 with banner weighs approximately 8-10 pounds, making it easy to transport to trade shows and events. Lightweight design doesn't compromise stability during display.

Can I ship directly to the convention center?

Yes, direct shipping to trade show venues is available. Contact Customer Service to arrange delivery timing and meet any special venue requirements for package receipt.

What if my artwork doesn't meet the size requirements?

Our design team can resize and optimize artwork files for proper banner stand dimensions. Professional design services ensure your graphics display correctly on the 78" x 36" banner.

Is there a warranty on the banner stand hardware?

Hardware includes manufacturer warranty against defects. Normal wear from trade show use is expected, but mechanism failures due to manufacturing issues are covered.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
